brief.coreMessage: HIPAA-compliant voice AI for patient communications

headlines: HIPAA-Compliant Voice AI with Sub-200ms Latency
Telnyx Voice AI: 99.999% Uptime for Healthcare Providers
One Platform for Voice AI with SOC 2 Type II Compliance
Own Network Infrastructure Ensures HIPAA-Ready Voice AI
Voice AI Engineered for Healthcare Security and Reliability
Reduce Latency in Patient Calls with Telnyx Voice AI
HIPAA and PCI Compliant Voice AI for Patient Communication
Telnyx Voice AI: Integrated Telephony and AI with Low Latency
Secure, Compliant Voice AI for Global Healthcare Networks
descriptions: Telnyx Voice AI operates on a proprietary network with sub-200ms latency and 99.999% uptime, ensuring HIPAA and SOC 2 Type II compliance for patient communications.
Manage patient interactions securely across 140+ countries using a single platform with HIPAA, SOC 2, and PCI certifications, eliminating vendor complexity.
Our platform integrates AI inference co-located with telephony infrastructure to maintain low latency and compliance standards required by healthcare providers.
Telnyx Voice AI provides a HIPAA-ready communication solution with SOC 2 Type II certification and proprietary network ownership, supporting secure patient engagement.
Simplify healthcare communications with a single compliant platform offering sub-200ms latency and 99.999% uptime, designed specifically for patient data security.
